news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态TVL本周上涨12%，主因新晋去中心化交易所交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked (TVL) rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new decentralized exchanges, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano公布2026年Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enabling stronger smart contract capabilities and lower fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案以降低小额转账手续费，核心开发者已提议。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
